title: doellingeria cornifolia
intro: Doellingeria cornifolia, also known as fernleaf aster or mountain sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Doellingeria cornifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and allergies, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Doellingeria cornifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
